title: Agent Counterparty Verification
body: Verify counterparty wallets before agent-initiated transactions using risk signals.

title: Agent Data Budget Manager
body: Track and optimise GoldRush API credit consumption across AI agent workflows.

title: Agent Fleet Monitor
body: Monitor a fleet of AI agent wallets for health, balances, and activity in one view.

title: Agent Wallet Skill
body: Give AI agents the ability to read wallet state, balances, and transaction data.

title: Claude GoldRush Skill
body: Claude agent skill for querying GoldRush APIs — fetch wallet data, prices, and NFTs.

title: GoldRush MCP Server
body: Model Context Protocol server exposing GoldRush APIs to LLMs and AI agents.

title: Real-time Wallet Stream
body: Subscribe to live wallet activity events via WebSocket — zero polling, instant updates.
